meaning: n.原因,导致某事发生的人或事,动机,理由,根据,目标,理想,事业vt.引起,惹起,使(发生),促成
examples: He died for a noble cause.
The drugs tend to cause drowsiness.
The immediate cause of death is unknown.
Both were keen, he said, to keep out the anarchists who might cause trouble.
Clearly, a very weak job market is the prime cause for this loss of hope.
